text:
Diablo Verde was a Mexican superhero and a member of The Vindicators who was mentioned in "Vindicators 3: The Return of Worldender". He was never seen, but he was mentioned to have died, along with Lady Katana and Calypso, in battle with Doom-Nomitron.

In Vindicators 2: "Girls Night" (a spin-off show published to Adult Swim's YouTube channel), it is revealed that she never fought Doom-Nomitron, and was actually killed by Supernova when she blacked out drunk. Although she is voiced by a male voice actor and has masculine features, their gender is up to debate, as he is considered to be a member of the “girls”, and having feminine gestures from time to time.

While not much is known, Diablo Verde can be assumed as a heroic and kind person, joining the Vindicators to do good. She is also somewhat polite, congratulating Supernova while admonishing said heroine for her ridiculous plan.

She also had a good relationship with Lady Katana and Calypso, since Supernova mentioned that she, Lady Katana and Calypso had "inside jokes" with each other, in Vindicators 2 episode "Girls Night"
